summary: Addressed follow-up usability review findings in terminal detection, recipe dedup flags, and sync help.
reason: Greptile noted that terminal detection failed open on stat errors, recipe add-to-list deduplication could not be disabled by either flag alone, and sync exposed a no-op --force flag.
validated_outcome: Local validation rerun covers tests, vet, govulncheck, verify-skill, publish validate, publish-package verifier, attribution guard, generated-artifact guard, and diff hygiene.
